sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113681" key="xeirote/nwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-τένων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113681.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with outstretched arms,</tr_> of the crab, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χειλο-</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:297" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">297</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
